response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "CreateOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle the creation of a new order",
      "behavior": "Check user existence, product stock, calculate total price, deduct stock, create order record",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PayOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle payment for an existing order",
      "behavior": "Check order exists and status is pending, check user balance, deduct balance, update order status to paid",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ShipOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle shipping of a paid order",
      "behavior": "Check order exists and status is paid, update status to shipped",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CompleteOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle completion of a shipped order",
      "behavior": "Check order exists and status is shipped, update status to completed",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrder",
      "purpose": "Handle cancellation of an order",
      "behavior": "Check order exists and status is pending or paid, restore stock, refund if paid, update status to cancelled",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListOrders",
      "purpose": "List orders with optional filters",
      "behavior": "Filter orders by user and/or status, return list",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "GetUserOrders",
      "purpose": "Get all orders for a user with statistics",
      "behavior": "Retrieve orders for given user, calculate total spent and status distribution",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ListProducts",
      "purpose": "List products with stock, optionally filter low stock",
      "behavior": "Retrieve products, filter by low stock if requested, return list",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "decomposition_rationale": "The Order Management System handles eight distinct commands. Each command is decomposed into a separate child function that directly performs the required operations without routing or dispatching. The parent function will parse the command and call the appropriate child, ensuring no cross-calls between siblings.",
